description: The first slot the agent offers gets booked by a rival caller mid-conversation; the booking must survive the conflict.
judge_questions: When the booking failed, did the agent apologize briefly and immediately offer alternatives from the tool result?
Did the caller end the call with a confirmed appointment?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hi, Diya. I’ve been having some recurring sinus trouble lately and I need to get an ENT check-up as soon as possible. Can you help me book an appointment?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I can certainly help you with that. We have Dr. Atul Kumar Mittal, who is the Chairman of ENT, available for consultations. His fee is two thousand rupees. Would you like me to check his availability for you?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, please. That sounds perfect. Can you check when his earliest slot is? I’d like to get this sorted out quickly.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Dr. Mittal has an opening this Saturday, July eighteenth. The earliest slots are at ten thirty in the morning, twelve noon, or five in the evening. Which of those works best for you?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: I'll take the ten-thirty slot, please. That works best for me.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Great. I have you down for Dr. Atul Kumar Mittal on Saturday, July eighteenth, at ten thirty in the morning. To finalize this, could I please have your full name and a ten-digit mobile number? Also, will this be a new consultation, a follow-up, or a teleconsultation?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: My name is Rakesh Yadav. The number is 9811111004. It’s a new consultation.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you, Rakesh. Let me confirm those details. You are booking a new consultation with Dr. Atul Kumar Mittal for Saturday, July eighteenth, at ten thirty in the morning. Your phone number is 9 8 1 1 1 1 1 0 0 4. Is that all correct?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, that’s all correct. Is the booking confirmed then?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I am very sorry, but that slot was just taken by another patient. Would you like to book the next available time on Saturday, July eighteenth, at twelve noon, or perhaps five in the evening?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: That's fine, I'll take the twelve noon slot instead. Please lock that in for me.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Your appointment is now confirmed. You are booked for a new consultation with Dr. Atul Kumar Mittal on Saturday, July eighteenth, at twelve noon. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, that’s all I needed. Thanks for your help, Diya. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: You're very welcome, Rakesh. Thank you for choosing Fortis Memorial Research Institute. Have a wonderful day, and goodbye.

doctors.name: Dr. Ajay Kumar Kriplani
doctors.designation: Principal Director & HOD Lap GI, GI Onco, Bariatric & MIS Surgery
doctors.departments: General Surgery | Gastroenterology and Hepatobiliary Sciences

result.note: multiple matches — ask the caller to choose
